thought.text: 我需要为函数定义和函数声明添加参数列表支持。还需要支持 `putint` 和 `getint` 函数调用（它们来自 sylib.h）。

action.old_str:
directDeclarator
    :   Identifier
    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
    |   directDeclarator LeftParen RightParen
    ;
action.new_str:
directDeclarator
    :   Identifier
    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
    |   directDeclarator LeftParen parameterTypeList? RightParen
    ;

parameterTypeList
    :   parameterList
    ;

parameterList
    :   parameterDeclaration (Comma parameterDeclaration)*
    ;

parameterDeclaration
    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator
    ;

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "new_str": "directDeclarator
    :   Identifier
    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
    |   directDeclarator LeftParen parameterTypeList? RightParen
    ;

parameterTypeList
    :   parameterList
    ;

parameterList
    :   parameterDeclaration (Comma parameterDeclaration)*
    ;

parameterDeclaration
    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator
    ;", "old_str": "directDeclarator
    :   Identifier
    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
    |   directDeclarator LeftParen RightParen
    ;", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4"}
